steps.title: Identify the input
steps.content: The function $m(t)$ gives body mass after $t$ days. Therefore, in $m(315)$, the input $315$ represents days after the animal was born.

steps.title: Identify the output
steps.content: The statement $m(315)$ is approximately $352$ means the predicted output, or body mass, is approximately $352$ kilograms when the input is $315$ days. The answer is B.
